menu.name: Pakhala Bhata
menu.description: Odisha's iconic summer staple. Fermented rice served with accompaniments.

menu.name: Chhena Poda
menu.description: The original cheesecake of India. Caramelized cottage cheese dessert.

menu.name: Dalma
menu.description: Soul food of every Odia household. Lentils cooked with seasonal vegetables.

menu.name: Machha Besara
menu.description: River fish cooked in a sharp and aromatic mustard-turmeric gravy.

menu.name: Santula
menu.description: Nutritious everyday classic. Light steamed vegetable medley.

menu.name: Rasabali
menu.description: Divine sweet from Kendrapara. Flattened cottage cheese discs in thickened milk.

menu.name: Chhena Jhili
menu.description: Odisha's answer to gulab jamun. Soft paneer donuts in sugar syrup.

menu.name: Pitha Platter
menu.description: Festival special. Assorted rice-flour dumplings: Arisha, Manda, Enduri.
